biological_replicate: To explore this idea, we sought to map protein modifications induced during mammalian cell differentiation. We chose to study the response of mouse RAW264.7 macrophage cells to lipopolysaccharide (LPS)...
experimental_design: We chose to study the response of mouse RAW264.7 macrophage cells to lipopolysaccharide (LPS)...
number_of_biological_replicates: RAW264.7 cells were seeded 10 × 106 cells per 150 mm dish (6 dishes)
number_of_samples: 6 biological replicates and 18 fractions = 6 * 18 = 108 total samples.
